description: Week 6 + Week 7 of ROADMAP.md — corrections API, review UI mutations, course sign-off to hit MVP (M6), then polish/tests/production hardening (M7).

userStories.title: PATCH /api/features/[featureId]/hole — reassign hole
userStories.description: As a reviewer, I want to reassign a polygon to a different hole so that AI misassignments can be corrected.
acceptanceCriteria: Route at app/api/features/[featureId]/hole/route.ts with PATCH handler
Requires valid session; enforces org isolation via course.org_id on the feature
Rejects with 409 if the course is locked by a different user
Writes a corrections row with correction_type = 'hole_reassignment' and old_hole_id/new_hole_id BEFORE updating features.hole_id — both in the same Prisma transaction
Returns 422 if new hole_id does not belong to the same course
Returns updated feature JSON on success
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Implemented app/api/features/[featureId]/hole/route.ts + lib/corrections.ts helpers (getFeatureForMutation, getHoleRef, isLockedByOther). Atomic $transaction writes corrections row before UPDATE features.hole_id.

userStories.title: PATCH /api/features/[featureId]/type — change feature type
userStories.description: As a reviewer, I want to change a polygon's feature type so that mis-typed features (e.g. bunker labelled as green) can be corrected.
acceptanceCriteria: Route at app/api/features/[featureId]/type/route.ts with PATCH handler
Validates new feature_type against FeatureType enum; 422 on invalid
Rejects 409 if course locked by another user
Writes corrections row with correction_type = 'type_change', old_type, new_type BEFORE the UPDATE — same transaction
Returns updated feature JSON on success
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Implemented app/api/features/[featureId]/type/route.ts. Validates body featureType against FeatureType enum (422 for invalid/unchanged), reuses getFeatureForMutation + isLockedByOther. Atomic $transaction writes corrections (correction_type='type_change', original_feature_type, corrected_feature_type) before UPDATE features.feature_type. Casts to feature_type_enum explicitly in raw SQL.

userStories.title: PATCH /api/features/[featureId]/geometry — edit polygon geometry
userStories.description: As a reviewer, I want to save edited polygon geometry after vertex dragging so that AI polygon boundaries can be refined.
acceptanceCriteria: Route at app/api/features/[featureId]/geometry/route.ts with PATCH handler
Accepts GeoJSON MultiPolygon in request body
Uses raw SQL in lib/spatial.ts to run ST_IsValid and ST_Area(geometry::geography) — returns 422 if invalid or area < 20 m²
Rejects 409 if course locked by another user
Writes corrections row with correction_type = 'geometry_edit' and snapshot of prior geometry BEFORE updating features.geometry — same transaction
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Implemented app/api/features/[featureId]/geometry/route.ts. Body must be { geometry: GeoJSON MultiPolygon } (400 otherwise). Reuses lib/spatial.ts isGeometryValid() for ST_IsValid + ST_Area(::geography) — 422 on invalid or area < 20 m². Atomic $transaction: INSERT corrections ('geometry_edit') snapshotting f.geometry via INSERT...SELECT, then UPDATE features.geometry = ST_Multi(ST_GeomFromGeoJSON(...)).

userStories.title: DELETE /api/features/[featureId] — hard delete polygon with snapshot
userStories.description: As a reviewer, I want to delete a spurious polygon so the course geometry reflects reality.
acceptanceCriteria: Route at app/api/features/[featureId]/route.ts with DELETE handler
Rejects 409 if course locked by another user
Snapshots geometry, feature_type, hole_id, assignment_confidence into the corrections row (correction_type = 'polygon_delete') BEFORE the hard DELETE — same transaction
Corrections row survives after feature row is removed
Returns 204 on success
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: POST /api/courses/[id]/holes/[holeId]/confirm — confirm hole
userStories.description: As a reviewer, I want to mark a hole as confirmed so that sign-off can complete.
acceptanceCriteria: Route at app/api/courses/[id]/holes/[holeId]/confirm/route.ts with POST handler
Rejects 409 if course locked by another user
In one transaction: sets holes.needs_review = false, holes.confirmed = true, holes.confirmation_type = 'manual', and features.reviewed = true for all features on that hole
Writes corrections row with correction_type = 'hole_confirmed'
Returns updated hole JSON
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: POST /api/courses/[id]/review/complete — course sign-off
userStories.description: As a reviewer, I want to sign off on a course so it can progress to publishable state.
acceptanceCriteria: Route at app/api/courses/[id]/review/complete/route.ts with POST handler
Rejects 409 if locked by another user
Returns 400 if any hole on the course has needs_review = true AND confirmed = false

In one transaction: auto-confirms remaining high-confidence holes (sets confirmed = true, confirmation_type = 'auto'), sets courses.status = 'reviewed', records reviewer notes (optional body field) onto the final corrections summary row
Releases the course lock on success
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: GET /api/corrections — correction history by course
userStories.description: As a reviewer, I want to read correction history for a course so I can audit what changed.
acceptanceCriteria: Route at app/api/corrections/route.ts with GET handler
Accepts courseId query param; returns 400 if missing
Enforces org isolation via the course's org_id
Returns corrections ordered by created_at DESC with user email/name, correction_type, and geometry snapshot metadata
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Wire Inspector reassign-hole and change-type dropdowns
userStories.description: As a reviewer, I want the Inspector panel controls to actually submit reassignment and type changes so corrections flow end to end.
acceptanceCriteria: components/review/Inspector.tsx polygon view has a 'Reassign to hole' dropdown listing holes 1..N for the course; calling PATCH /api/features/[featureId]/hole on Apply
Polygon view has a 'Feature type' dropdown bound to FeatureType enum; calling PATCH /api/features/[featureId]/type on Apply
Apply button disabled until selection differs from current value; Cancel reverts
Blocks the Apply button during in-flight request; surfaces non-2xx errors inline (no optimistic writes)
Map canvas re-fetches GeoJSON after a successful mutation
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Mapbox GL Draw vertex-drag geometry editing
userStories.description: As a reviewer, I want to drag polygon vertices on the map and save the new shape so boundaries can be refined.
acceptanceCriteria: components/map/DrawMode.tsx wraps Mapbox GL Draw and mounts onto the review MapCanvas
'D' keyboard shortcut toggles draw mode on the currently selected polygon
While in draw mode, existing vertices are draggable; Enter/Apply submits the edited MultiPolygon to PATCH /api/features/[featureId]/geometry
422 responses surface an inline error and leave the original geometry untouched in the UI
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Delete polygon confirmation dialog
userStories.description: As a reviewer, I want a confirmation dialog before deleting a polygon so I don't delete by accident.
acceptanceCriteria: Delete action in Inspector opens a modal showing feature_type, hole number, and a 'Cannot be undone' warning
Confirm triggers DELETE /api/features/[featureId]; Cancel closes the modal with no request
Delete/Backspace key also triggers the dialog when a polygon is selected
On 2xx the polygon disappears from the map and hole polygon list refreshes
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Ctrl+Z single-level undo per correction
userStories.description: As a reviewer, I want to undo my last correction so I can recover from a misclick.
acceptanceCriteria: Review page tracks the last applied correction (type + payload) in client state

Ctrl+Z issues the inverse correction via the correction API (e.g. reassign back to prior hole, restore prior type/geometry, recreate deleted polygon via a new feature insert endpoint only if the original still has snapshot data — otherwise undo is disabled with tooltip)
Only one level of undo — after undo, the slot is cleared
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Offline / server-failure warning — block submission without 2xx
userStories.description: As a reviewer, I want a clear warning if my correction didn't save, so I never assume a failed save succeeded.
acceptanceCriteria: All correction mutations in Inspector/DrawMode/Delete treat non-2xx (or network error) as failure: UI state does NOT advance and the original polygon/hole state remains visible
Toast or banner shows the error message with a Retry button
No optimistic updates anywhere in the review UI
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Review UI keyboard shortcuts — D, Delete/Backspace, Enter, Ctrl+Z
userStories.description: As a reviewer, I want keyboard shortcuts for frequent correction actions so I can review quickly.
acceptanceCriteria: D toggles draw mode on selected polygon (already shipped via US-009 — confirm global handler)
Delete or Backspace opens delete-polygon dialog when a polygon is selected
Enter confirms the currently active hole (calls POST /confirm)
Ctrl+Z triggers single-level undo
Shortcuts are no-ops when focus is inside an input/textarea
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Sign-off screen with correction summary and reviewer notes
userStories.description: As a reviewer, I want a final sign-off view with a summary and notes field so I can close out the course.
acceptanceCriteria: Sign-off view reachable from the review page once all flagged holes are resolved
Shows correction counts by type (reassignment, type change, geometry edit, delete), auto-confirm count, and a textarea for reviewer notes
'Mark Course Reviewed' button calls POST /api/courses/[id]/review/complete with the notes in body
400 responses render inline with the names of holes still blocking sign-off
On success navigates back to /dashboard/courses/[id]/overview with the course now in 'reviewed' status
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Auto-advance to next flagged hole on confirm
userStories.description: As a reviewer, I want the UI to jump to the next flagged hole after I confirm one so I can move through review without clicking.
acceptanceCriteria: After a successful POST /confirm, HoleList selects the next hole where needs_review = true AND confirmed = false (by lowest assignment_confidence)
Map fits to the newly selected hole
When no flagged holes remain, the UI surfaces a 'Ready to sign off' CTA to open the sign-off screen
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Tests — transaction integrity for correction endpoints
userStories.description: As a developer, I want tests that prove corrections + mutations are atomic so a half-applied correction can never ship.
acceptanceCriteria: Jest tests under tests/api/ cover: PATCH hole, PATCH type, PATCH geometry, DELETE feature
Each test forces the feature mutation to fail (e.g. invalid FK) and asserts the corrections row was rolled back too
And forces the corrections insert to fail and asserts the feature row was unchanged
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Tests — lock 409, geometry 422, sign-off 400
userStories.description: As a developer, I want behavioural tests on the key reject paths so regressions are caught in CI.
acceptanceCriteria: Test: a correction endpoint returns 409 when the course lock is held by a different user
Test: PATCH geometry returns 422 for ST_IsValid = false polygon
Test: PATCH geometry returns 422 for polygon with area < 20 m²
Test: POST /review/complete returns 400 when any hole has needs_review = true AND confirmed = false, and the course status is unchanged
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Tests — hard delete preserves corrections row
userStories.description: As a developer, I want proof that the corrections audit trail survives a polygon delete.
acceptanceCriteria: Test: DELETE /api/features/[featureId] removes the feature row (SELECT returns nothing)
Test: the corresponding corrections row with correction_type = 'polygon_delete' remains, with geometry, feature_type, hole_id, and assignment_confidence snapshots populated
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: API route tests — org isolation across all correction endpoints
userStories.description: As a developer, I want all correction routes covered by org-isolation tests so cross-org data access is impossible.
acceptanceCriteria: For each correction endpoint (PATCH hole, PATCH type, PATCH geometry, DELETE feature, POST confirm, POST review/complete, GET corrections): a test verifies that a user in org A cannot read or mutate a feature/course owned by org B (404 or 403)
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Component tests — HoleList, Inspector, CorrectionActions
userStories.description: As a developer, I want component tests for the review UI so rendering logic is covered.
acceptanceCriteria: HoleList test: flagged holes sort by assignment_confidence ASC at top; confirmed holes below by hole number; progress counter matches confirmed/total
Inspector test: renders hole view vs polygon view based on selection; dropdown options populate correctly
CorrectionActions test: Apply is disabled until a change is staged; Cancel reverts; error state renders on mocked non-2xx
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Sentry wired into the Next.js app
userStories.description: As an operator, I want production errors captured in Sentry so I can diagnose issues without user reports.
acceptanceCriteria: @sentry/nextjs installed and configured with sentry.client.config.ts + sentry.server.config.ts + sentry.edge.config.ts using SENTRY_DSN env var
next.config.mjs wraps with withSentryConfig
DSN absence does not crash local dev (only initialises when SENTRY_DSN is set)
A deliberately thrown error from an API route is captured (verifiable by checking captureException is called — unit test with mocked Sentry)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: deploy.yml smoke tests
userStories.description: As an operator, I want post-deploy smoke checks so a broken deploy is caught before users hit it.
acceptanceCriteria: .github/workflows/deploy.yml runs after Vercel deploy: curl GET $STAGING_URL/api/health expecting 200
curl -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' GET $STAGING_URL/dashboard/courses expecting 307 or 302 (unauth redirect to /login)
Workflow fails if either smoke check fails
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Performance validation script
userStories.description: As an operator, I want a script that measures the NFR targets so we know whether the MVP meets them before cutover.
acceptanceCriteria: scripts/perf-check.ts (ts-node runnable) that exercises: course library page render, GET /api/courses/[id]/features/geojson latency, correction save round-trip (PATCH hole), and outputs a pass/fail table against the NFR targets in ROADMAP.md (library < 1.5s, map render < 2s, correction < 500ms)
Script is runnable via npm run perf:check and documented in README.md
Typecheck passes
